title: Creamy Thai Noodle Khao Soi
description: A pungent and tender Thai dish featuring peanut cookies and nuka-pickle, served in a molcajete, this khao soi is gluten-free friendly and full of energizing flavors.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the coconut milk, fish sauce, brown sugar, and lime juice, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 5 minutes, or until it thickens slightly.
Add the noodles to the saucepan and cook for 3 minutes, or until they are tender.
Stir in the crushed peanut cookies and sliced nuka-pickle.
Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the khao soi to a molcajete and garnish with chopped cilantro and scallions.
Serve the khao soi hot, with additional peanut cookies and nuka-pickle on the side if desired.
